checks.why: A complete report has at least a summary, findings, and next steps. Free to check, never drifts.
Unfinished output must never reach a client. Deterministic, always caught.
Every report must say who it is for, so a scheduled run can't send a generic one.
Keeps every weekly report to the same length a client can actually read.
A report with no clear next step is filler. Rule-checkable, so it always holds.

checks.prompt: Does this read in a clear, confident, jargon-free voice a busy agency client would trust — no fluff, no AI-slop? Answer PASS or FAIL and one sentence why.
checks.why: The fuzzy part a rule can't catch. Runs only with --allow-model; use sparingly.
